articles.title: What Jaylen Brown said of Jayson Tatum’s return to Celtics
articles.description:
"We have a great understanding of what it means to win. We’ve won for a long time."

The post What Jaylen Brown said of Jayson Tatum’s return to Celtics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown praised Jayson Tatum's return, emphasizing their winning chemistry.
Both players have contributed to the Celtics' long-term success together.
Their collaboration is crucial for Boston's playoff aspirations this season.
